meta.title: M.A.T-Fish | Fresh Fish Supplier and Fish Farming in Finland.
meta.description: M.A.T-Fish is a fish farming company in Aland, Finland, producing farmed rainbow trout, whitefish and seasonal rainbow trout roe.

hero.subtitle: Fresh fish products and sustainable fish farming from the clean waters of the Aland archipelago.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: Carefully produced farmed fish from the clean Nordic waters of the Aland archipelago.

fresh.title: Freshness Guaranteed
fresh.description: Fresh fish products handled close to production to support consistent quality for commercial customers.

sustainable.title: Sustainable practices
sustainable.description: Fish farming practices focused on quality, responsibility and respect for the local marine environment.

local.title: Local Excellence
local.description: Rooted in Foglo and the Aland archipelago, combining local knowledge with modern fish production.

about.title: Our Commitment.
about.description: M.A.T-Fish is dedicated to responsible fish farming in the Aland archipelago. We combine local expertise, careful production and modern practices to produce high-quality fish for food industry customers and further processing.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Looking for a fresh fish supplier in Finland? Contact M.A.T-Fish to discuss rainbow trout, whitefish, rainbow trout roe and commercial supply needs.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: We produce high-quality farmed fish from the clean waters of the Aland archipelago, combining local expertise with modern practices for commercial customers and further processing.

rainbowTrout.name: Rainbow Trout
rainbowTrout.description: Rainbow trout is one of Finland's most popular food fish and an important product for commercial fish supply.
rainbowTrout.details: We grow rainbow trout under carefully monitored conditions to a sales size of approximately 2.5 kilograms over two growing seasons. Rainbow trout is valued for its versatility, omega-3 fatty acids, vitamin D and protein, making it suitable for food industry use, retail and professional kitchens.

whitefish.name: Whitefish
whitefish.description: Whitefish is a highly valued Nordic food fish known for refined flavor, lean flesh and versatile use.
whitefish.details: Our whitefish is characterized by low-fat, high-protein white flesh. We raise whitefish to a sales size of 0.4-1 kilograms under controlled conditions and deliver it fresh for customers who need consistent Nordic fish quality.

caviar.name: Rainbow Trout Roe
caviar.description: Rainbow trout roe is a seasonal delicacy available from late autumn to early winter.
caviar.details: Rich in omega-3 fatty acids and vitamin B12, rainbow trout roe is both flavorful and nutritious. We deliver roe sacks to clients for further processing, supporting freshness and quality for the commercial sector.

contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Needs
contact.description: Contact us to discuss product availability, commercial supply needs and how M.A.T-Fish can support your fish product requirements.

hero.title: About M.A.T-Fish
hero.description: A fish farming company from the Aland archipelago, founded in 2010 and focused on high-quality farmed fish products for commercial customers.

quality.title: Quality Excellence
quality.description: We maintain high standards throughout our operations, from fish farming to delivery. Every product is handled with care to support consistent quality for commercial customers.

sustainability.title: Environmental Commitment
sustainability.description: Our farming practices are designed with respect for the archipelago's marine environment. We believe responsible fish farming must balance quality, production and local conditions.

responsibility.title: Social Responsibility
responsibility.description: We take pride in supporting our local community and maintaining strong relationships with our partners, employees, and customers.

community.title: Local Heritage
community.description: Deeply rooted in the Aland archipelago, we combine local knowledge with modern fish farming practices.

founding.title: Company Founding
founding.description: We began our operations in the village of Flisö in Föglö, focusing on traditional fish farming methods.

expansion.title: Market Expansion
expansion.description: Extended operations and established strong partnerships with leading Finnish food producers.

modernization.title: Facility Modernization
modernization.description: We adopted modern farming technologies while maintaining traditional quality standards.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Future
sustainability.description: We began to focus more on a sustainable future and enhanced our environmental protection efforts.

contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Needs
contact.description: We'd be happy to tell you more about our products and discuss potential collaboration.

contactpage.title: Get in Touch
contactpage.subtitle: Contact our team to discuss fresh fish products, commercial supply, product availability and further processing needs.

roles.ceo: Chief Executive Officer | Sales and Purchasing

location.title: Our Location
location.subtitle: We operate in the heart of the Åland Archipelago, in the village of Flisö in the municipality of Föglö.
location.mapNotice: We do not load a third-party map automatically in order to protect your privacy. You can open the location in Google Maps on your own request.

form.title: Send a message
form.description: Tell us briefly what fish products, volumes or supply information you need and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.privacy: By sending the form, you agree that we may process your information in order to respond to your inquiry.
